full_text: Chatara to Davey, 1 run, slower off-cutter outside off, cut to extra-cover and it's just a single. Scotland end on 132

full_text: Chatara to Davey, 2 runs, full outside off, driven to long-on and it's a long throw so they come back for the second

short_text: Chatara to Davey, 1 run, slower off-cutter dug in outside off outside off, Davey helps it to deep square leg but does no
full_text: Chatara to Davey, 1 run, slower off-cutter dug in outside off outside off, Davey helps it to deep square leg but does not cross the line with his bat as he completes the first run.

short_text: Chatara to MacLeod, Caught by Jongwe!! Full and wide outside off, MacLeod drives in the air and picks out cover-point. S
full_text: Chatara to MacLeod, Caught by Jongwe!! Full and wide outside off, MacLeod drives in the air and picks out cover-point. Sharp catch as it went over his head. Reverse-cupped though.

full_text: Chatara to Chris Greaves, 1 run, full outside off, Chris Greaves sinks low and paddles a single to deep backward square leg

full_text: Chatara to MacLeod, 1 run, off-cutter on a fuller length outside off, swept on the bounce to deep square leg

full_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, 1 run, full slower ball on the stumps, swung away to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, 1 run, full outside off, Chris Greaves crashes it straight to the fielder at sweeper cover

short_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, leg byes, , that's unlucky for Ngarava and Zimbabwe. It beats Chris Greaves' swing to leg but
full_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, leg byes, , that's unlucky for Ngarava and Zimbabwe. It beats Chris Greaves' swing to leg but flicks the thigh and goes just wide of the right hand of the diving Chakabva. Runs away for four

short_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, third dot in a row. What an over this is. Now the off-cutter on a yorker length just o
full_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, third dot in a row. What an over this is. Now the off-cutter on a yorker length just outside off, Chris Greaves again finds Ngarava as he digs it out

short_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, well bowled. Right up there, dug out back to Ngarava
full_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, well bowled. Right up there, dug out back to Ngarava

short_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, yorker length outside off, Chris Greaves tries the paddle and misses
full_text: Ngarava to Chris Greaves, no run, yorker length outside off, Chris Greaves tries the paddle and misses

short_text: Muzarabani to Chris Greaves, 1 run, another yorker targetting middle-stump, Chris Greaves drives it back to Muzarabani w
full_text: Muzarabani to Chris Greaves, 1 run, another yorker targetting middle-stump, Chris Greaves drives it back to Muzarabani who fails to stop it, gives away the single

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, Bowled!! Muzarabani has his revenge. That's where Muzarabani needed to bowl and nails the yorker le
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, Bowled!! Muzarabani has his revenge. That's where Muzarabani needed to bowl and nails the yorker length delivery on leg-stump, Leask swings and misses, off the pad and cannons back on to leg-stump. No celebration from Muzarabani.

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , that's a length ball just outside off, Leask slaughters it hard and beats long-on's dive to his l
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , that's a length ball just outside off, Leask slaughters it hard and beats long-on's dive to his left, the pace on the shot beat Madhevere's dive

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, 2 runs, the yorker on the stumps, thick inside-edge on the swing to leg, the ball rolls to the unma
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, 2 runs, the yorker on the stumps, thick inside-edge on the swing to leg, the ball rolls to the unmanned mid-wicket area and they come back for a couple

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, no run, the free-hit is a dot. It's the slower ball outside off, Leask swings and misses
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, no run, the free-hit is a dot. It's the slower ball outside off, Leask swings and misses

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , good comeback by Muzarabani! Or is it! This is full and just wide of leg-stump as Leask drives an
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , good comeback by Muzarabani! Or is it! This is full and just wide of leg-stump as Leask drives and misses. Muzarabani has overstepped. Another free-hit coming up

short_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , wide of the diving extra-cover and mid-off. Perfectly split. Wide fullish delivery outside off, L
full_text: Muzarabani to Leask, , wide of the diving extra-cover and mid-off. Perfectly split. Wide fullish delivery outside off, Leask thumps it and finds the gap as extra-cover is beaten to his right and mid-off to his left

short_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, , the free-hit goes for four. Another off-cutter outside off, MacLeod belts it across the line and b
full_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, , the free-hit goes for four. Another off-cutter outside off, MacLeod belts it across the line and beats deep mid-wicket to his left. Pure power that

short_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, , 2 runs, off-cutter outside off, hit into the ground straight down the ground for a couple and Ngar
full_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, , 2 runs, off-cutter outside off, hit into the ground straight down the ground for a couple and Ngarava has overstepped

full_text: Ngarava to Leask, 1 run, slower delivery full outside off, driven to sweeper cover

full_text: Ngarava to MacLeod, 1 run, full outside off, clubbed to long-on

full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, Caught by Milton Shumba!! Munsey flicks and picks out deep square leg diving forward. The set batter Munsey goes. Backs away outside leg, this is full and following him, he flicks but does not get the elevation, good catch by Shumba as Ngarava strikes on his comeback.

full_text: Raza to Munsey, 2 runs, low full-toss on the stumps, flicked wide of long-on and Madhevere in trying to throw it back, flings it behind him, but it's just two

full_text: Raza to Munsey, 1 run, full on the stumps, Munsey backs away and crashes it wide of extra-cover for a single

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, 1 run, 50 for Munsey. Another one in this World Cup. Drags the slower off-cutter from outside off to deep mid-wicket with a pull

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, no run, Munsey wanted to hoick that over deep mid-wicket but misses, it was on a good length and flicks the back thigh, too high though for LBW and no bat even as Chakabva drops that

full_text: Madhevere to Munsey, no run, fullish outside off, driven straight to the fielder at extra-cover

full_text: Madhevere to Munsey, 2 runs, Flat-batted to Madhevere who lets it go through his hands, it dribbles in front of Sean Williams at long-off, he throws it high to Madhevere who has to bring the ball down, but breaks the stumps with his hand as he drops the ball. MacLeod was diving back to get in, but would've been out

full_text: Chatara to Munsey, 1 run, short of length on the pads, Munsey flicks too early and the leading-edge lobs just wide of mid-wicket to his left

full_text: Raza to Munsey, no run, slower on the stumps, pushed to Raza's right

full_text: Raza to MacLeod, 1 run, full outside off, driven to long-off

short_text: Raza to Berrington, Caught by Milton Shumba!! Straight to deep mid-wicket. Berrington was struggling and goes now. Full
full_text: Raza to Berrington, Caught by Milton Shumba!! Straight to deep mid-wicket. Berrington was struggling and goes now. Full on the stumps, he goes for a slogsweep but picks out Shumba at deep mid-wicket. Straight to his lap and he makes no mistake. Berrington was hitting to the bigger side and did not get anywhere near the elevation to clear the man there.

short_text: Raza to Munsey, 1 run, slower outside off, Munsey goes for a big drive and the thick inside-edge goes wide of the stumps
full_text: Raza to Munsey, 1 run, slower outside off, Munsey goes for a big drive and the thick inside-edge goes wide of the stumps. Lucky

short_text: Raza to Munsey, , fired down leg. another wide
full_text: Raza to Munsey, , fired down leg. another wide

short_text: Raza to Munsey, no run, short and wide outside off, Munsey crashes it hard and more good fielding this time from Ervine,
full_text: Raza to Munsey, no run, short and wide outside off, Munsey crashes it hard and more good fielding this time from Ervine, as he dives to his right to save four at extra-cover

short_text: Williams to Berrington, 2 runs, great effort by Madhevere from deep mid-wicket as he runs in and dives forward but the b
full_text: Williams to Berrington, 2 runs, great effort by Madhevere from deep mid-wicket as he runs in and dives forward but the ball just bounces short of his dive. Would've been one of the catches of this tournament had he taken that. Total miscue on the sweep and Berrington gets away

full_text: Williams to Munsey, 1 run, full on the stumps, driven to long-on

full_text: Williams to Berrington, 1 run, the sweep now, from the stumps, deep backward square knows it won't carry so takes it on the bounce

full_text: Williams to Berrington, no run, good stop by Raza at extra-cover. Berrington backs away and crashes it hard and Raza on the dive saves runs

full_text: Williams to Munsey, , down leg and a poor delivery with backward square leg inside, flicked away over that man. Easy for Munsey

full_text: Williams to Berrington, 1 run, flat on the stumps, punched to the right of Williams who gets across and dives but can't get hold of the ball

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, , good end to the powerplay. Short but bouncing outside off, Munsey cuts hard and between point and cover-point for four. Got on top of the bounce there

full_text: Muzarabani to Berrington, 1 run, dug in short outside off, Berrington glides it with an open face to third man

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, no run, That has spat from a back of a length at Munsey and he is lucky that he does not find a fielder as he backs away to cut, off the handle and the glove as it rolls to cover

full_text: Muzarabani to Berrington, 1 run, full on off, Berrington gets forward to drive and sets off, makes it in with a dive as it was a tight single

full_text: Muzarabani to Berrington, no run, what a cracker that is. Lifting and angling into Berrington who gets forward to defend, the bounce takes it over the off-stump after beating the outside-edge as Berrington defended inside the line

short_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , full outside off, Munsey is given the width he wanted and drives this through extra cover. The fiel
full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , full outside off, Munsey is given the width he wanted and drives this through extra cover. The fielder gets a hand to it but the power was still good enough to get the southpaw a boundary

full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , strays down the leg side

full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , hits the deck hard on a length but strays down leg. Munsey underedges his pull that goes agonisingly to the right of the keeper's dive. Munsey gets a boundary as Chakabva might need some treatment after injuring his back during the wide

full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, leg byes, 2 runs, full and almost down leg, Munsey misses his flick and gets stuck on his back pad to sneak another leg bye towards fine leg

full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, no run, Ngarava nails the yorker on the pads. Munsey just about digs it out towards mid-on

full_text: Ngarava to Berrington, 1 run, pace off length ball outside off, dabbed to the right of third-man to get off the mark

short_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, Caught by Madhevere!! good length delivery on off, Cross whacks it across the line but Madheve
full_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, Caught by Madhevere!! good length delivery on off, Cross whacks it across the line but Madhevere at mid-wicket dives to his left like a leaping salmon to get Zimbabwe a wicket out of nothing. The African team are looking pumped up for this must win game!

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, no run, good length outside off, cut into the ground towards Raza at covers

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, , pace off and pitched up on off, Munsey read it accurately and drives it well to the left of the mid-off fielder for a boundary

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, no run, on a length on off, punched towards extra cover

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, , full and quick on off, Munsey stays low and whacks it straight down the ground. Rushes past Muzarabani who can't stick out his hand in his followthrough

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, 2 runs, an ideal yorker on off, Munsey shuffled closer and lifts his drive over the bowlers head. Didn't time it cleanly so it'll just be a couple

short_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, , on a length and leaving Munsey outside off, but Muzarabani has overstepped!
full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, , on a length and leaving Munsey outside off, but Muzarabani has overstepped!

full_text: Muzarabani to Munsey, no run, full and quick on off, driven hard but finds mid-on

full_text: Chatara to Munsey, leg byes, 1 run, fuller on the pads, Munsey misses his flick but takes the leg bye to backward square leg

short_text: Chatara to Munsey, no run, full and wide outside off, driven straight to covers
full_text: Chatara to Munsey, no run, full and wide outside off, driven straight to covers

short_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, leg byes, 1 run, Cross shuffled away and stepped out to slog, Chatara follows him and gets thi
full_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, leg byes, 1 run, Cross shuffled away and stepped out to slog, Chatara follows him and gets this delivery to strike his pads. Leg bye taken towards square leg

short_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, a tad fuller and this one shaped back in. Matthew Cross foxed by the movement and is l
full_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, a tad fuller and this one shaped back in. Matthew Cross foxed by the movement and is late on his cut shot, inside edging it onto his pads

short_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, on a length with a bit of away shape from off, backfoot punched but picks out point
full_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, on a length with a bit of away shape from off, backfoot punched but picks out point

short_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, good length outside off, dabbed towards backward point
full_text: Chatara to Matthew Cross, no run, good length outside off, dabbed towards backward point

short_text: Ngarava to Munsey, no run, clever from Ngarava. Saw Munsey shuffle away and followed him with a short pitched one. The b
full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, no run, clever from Ngarava. Saw Munsey shuffle away and followed him with a short pitched one. The batter was forced to duck down to cover

short_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, 1 run, back of a length and slightly wider, run down to third-man
full_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, 1 run, back of a length and slightly wider, run down to third-man

short_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, no run, lovely delivery! Matthew Cross beaten by the length and movement from Ngarava as the b
full_text: Ngarava to Matthew Cross, no run, lovely delivery! Matthew Cross beaten by the length and movement from Ngarava as the ball whizzes past his outside edge

short_text: Ngarava to Munsey, 1 run, back of a length on leg, tucked towards deep backward square leg
full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, 1 run, back of a length on leg, tucked towards deep backward square leg

short_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , on a length angling into middle and leg, Munsey stays still and effortlessly laps it over square le
full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, , on a length angling into middle and leg, Munsey stays still and effortlessly laps it over square leg. The ball bounces awkwardly and changes direction to trick the fielder running in from deep mid-wicket. Unlucky for Zimbabwe but that'll be the first four for Munsey!

short_text: Ngarava to Munsey, no run, back of a length on off, no movement. Cut into the ground towards the point fielder
full_text: Ngarava to Munsey, no run, back of a length on off, no movement. Cut into the ground towards the point fielder

short_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, Caught by Raza!! The early wicket and Zimbabwe are ecstatic as the camera cuts to a group of f
full_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, Caught by Raza!! The early wicket and Zimbabwe are ecstatic as the camera cuts to a group of fans in the stands! On a length and shaping away from off, Michael Jones slashed at it with no foot movement, gets a edge that flies over the infield but a backwards running Sikandar Raza from covers takes a well judged catch.

short_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run, pitched up and straight, driven back to the bowler
full_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run, pitched up and straight, driven back to the bowler

short_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, , full on middle and leg, shaping away. Michael Jones gives himself room and drives with a ful
full_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, , full on middle and leg, shaping away. Michael Jones gives himself room and drives with a full bat face down the ground to the right of mid-off

short_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run
full_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run

short_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run, good length on off, dabbed towards gully
full_text: Chatara to Michael Jones, no run, good length on off, dabbed towards gully

short_text: Chatara to Munsey, 1 run, swing!! on a length and shapes back onto Munsey's pads as he inside edges his clip. Sneaks tow
full_text: Chatara to Munsey, 1 run, swing!! on a length and shapes back onto Munsey's pads as he inside edges his clip. Sneaks towards square leg for a single

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ryan Burl, , and Ryan Burl does it in style!! Shorter length on off, slapped down the ground over the
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ryan Burl, , and Ryan Burl does it in style!! Shorter length on off, slapped down the ground over the leap of mid-on.

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short pitched, calmly pulled towards deep square leg.
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short pitched, calmly pulled towards deep square leg.

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ryan Burl, 1 run, pitched up and straight, driven softly towards mid-off to sneak another single

short_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, flat on middle, slapped down the ground past the bowler and long-on is too wide. An easy
full_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, flat on middle, slapped down the ground past the bowler and long-on is too wide. An easy double for Shumba

short_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 1 run, full and quick on off, driven past the bowler's dive to mid-off to steal a valuable single
full_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 1 run, full and quick on off, driven past the bowler's dive to mid-off to steal a valuable single

short_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 2 runs, short and quick onto off, Burl rocks back to cut it pretty late towards deep backward point
full_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 2 runs, short and quick onto off, Burl rocks back to cut it pretty late towards deep backward point

short_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short outside off, cut towards sweeper cover,
full_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 1 run, short outside off, cut towards sweeper cover,

short_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 1 run, quick onto middle and leg, glanced softly towards square leg as the keeper chases after it in
full_text: Leask to Ryan Burl, 1 run, quick onto middle and leg, glanced softly towards square leg as the keeper chases after it in a flash to keep it to a single

short_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 1 run, flat at the stumps, glanced softly towards deep mid-wicket. JUST A SINGLE!
full_text: Leask to Milton Shumba, 1 run, flat at the stumps, glanced softly towards deep mid-wicket. JUST A SINGLE!

short_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, Caught by MacLeod!! Muted celebrations from the Scots but internally they'd be buzzing! Pitched up
full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, Caught by MacLeod!! Muted celebrations from the Scots but internally they'd be buzzing! Pitched up on off, Ervine shuffled away to try and lift his drive over the infield. Didn't time it anywhere close to as well as needed, chips it tamely towards a backwards running mid-off fielder. A needless risky shot from the veteran batter, he'll hope that'll not cost his side.

short_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, 1 run, flat at the stumps, tucked behind square
full_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, 1 run, flat at the stumps, tucked behind square

short_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, no run, flat outside off, Shumba can't connect on his cut
full_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, no run, flat outside off, Shumba can't connect on his cut

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, flat on off, slapped to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, 1 run, Full on off, driven straight to covers and the fielder throws it well wide of the kee
full_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, 1 run, Full on off, driven straight to covers and the fielder throws it well wide of the keeper to allow Ervine to get in with a dive. Had the throw been better or at the other end, there was a wicket on offer

short_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, no run, full and quick outside off, driven into the ground towards covers
full_text: Mark Watt to Milton Shumba, no run, full and quick outside off, driven into the ground towards covers

full_text: Wheal to Milton Shumba, 1 run, back of a length on the body, tucked towards square leg

full_text: Wheal to Ervine, 1 run, pace off and pitched up on off, Ervine waits to dab it down to third-man

short_text: Wheal to Ervine, , superb!! Full and wide outside off, Ervine plays the perfect cover drive that splits mid-off and cove
full_text: Wheal to Ervine, , superb!! Full and wide outside off, Ervine plays the perfect cover drive that splits mid-off and covers. Vital boundary

short_text: Wheal to Milton Shumba, 1 run, length ball just outside off, late cut towards deep backward point
full_text: Wheal to Milton Shumba, 1 run, length ball just outside off, late cut towards deep backward point

short_text: Wheal to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, fuller on the pads, nudged sweetly to the left of the fine leg fielder to get a couple o
full_text: Wheal to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, fuller on the pads, nudged sweetly to the left of the fine leg fielder to get a couple of runs

short_text: Wheal to Ervine, 1 run, full outside off, driven to sweeper cover
full_text: Wheal to Ervine, 1 run, full outside off, driven to sweeper cover

short_text: Davey to Raza, Caught by Matthew Cross!! Wow! A wicket out of nothing. It was a cutter that went wrong and strayed down
full_text: Davey to Raza, Caught by Matthew Cross!! Wow! A wicket out of nothing. It was a cutter that went wrong and strayed down leg, Raza would have easily pulled this over square leg on most days but this time he tickles it through to the keeper. Scotland still have a chance.

short_text: Davey to Ervine, 1 run, good length and skids onto leg, turned towards deep square leg
full_text: Davey to Ervine, 1 run, good length and skids onto leg, turned towards deep square leg

short_text: Davey to Raza, 1 run, length ball on off, Raza steps out for a big slog but splices it towards long-on
full_text: Davey to Raza, 1 run, length ball on off, Raza steps out for a big slog but splices it towards long-on

short_text: Davey to Raza, , poor delivery and punished!! Length ball but strays down leg, Raza is so quick to get down on one knee
full_text: Davey to Raza, , poor delivery and punished!! Length ball but strays down leg, Raza is so quick to get down on one knee and lift this over short fine

short_text: Davey to Ervine, 1 run, full on middle and leg, Ervine shuffles closer and lifts his flick towards deep backward square
full_text: Davey to Ervine, 1 run, full on middle and leg, Ervine shuffles closer and lifts his flick towards deep backward square leg. What a timely 50 from the veteran batter

short_text: Davey to Ervine, 2 runs, full on off, Ervine goes for a wild slog and gets a thick edge down to third-man
full_text: Davey to Ervine, 2 runs, full on off, Ervine goes for a wild slog and gets a thick edge down to third-man

short_text: Davey to Ervine, , pace off length ball on off, cut towards backward point
full_text: Davey to Ervine, , pace off length ball on off, cut towards backward point

short_text: Leask to Raza, no run, flat down leg, brushes the thigh pad through to the keeper.
full_text: Leask to Raza, no run, flat down leg, brushes the thigh pad through to the keeper.

short_text: Leask to Raza, , fired fuller on off, Raza clears his front leg to get a thick edge on his big drive that flies over bac
full_text: Leask to Raza, , fired fuller on off, Raza clears his front leg to get a thick edge on his big drive that flies over backward point. It is turning out to be an expensive over!!

short_text: Leask to Raza, 2 runs, flater on middle and leg, tucked softly towards deep mid-wicket for a couple of runs
full_text: Leask to Raza, 2 runs, flater on middle and leg, tucked softly towards deep mid-wicket for a couple of runs

short_text: Leask to Raza, , a shot of sheer class! Full with a bit of width, Raza opens his arms to lift it over cover all the way
full_text: Leask to Raza, , a shot of sheer class! Full with a bit of width, Raza opens his arms to lift it over cover all the way for a maximum!

short_text: Leask to Raza, no run, fired into off, Raza looked to scoop it over short fine but cops one onto his helmet. He looks to
full_text: Leask to Raza, no run, fired into off, Raza looked to scoop it over short fine but cops one onto his helmet. He looks to be in some pain here!

full_text: Leask to Ervine, 1 run, flat outside off, cut square of the wicket for a single

full_text: Mark Watt to Raza, no run, flat on leg, blocked to the right of the bowler

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, fired fuller at the stumps, pushed back to the bowler who can't get his hands down in time. A half chance goes down!

short_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, , innovative!! Flat outside off and Ervine switch hits this over the backward point fielder. Nobody
full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, , innovative!! Flat outside off and Ervine switch hits this over the backward point fielder. Nobody in the deep as the ball ambles away to the fence

full_text: Mark Watt to Raza, 1 run, flat on off, cut hard but picks out sweeper cover

full_text: Mark Watt to Raza, no run, full on the pads, defended back to the bowler

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, quicker on off, Ervine with a little tap and run towards point

short_text: MacLeod to Raza, , Superb!! Half tracker from MacLeod, Raza leans back and gets great power on his bottom hand to deposi
full_text: MacLeod to Raza, , Superb!! Half tracker from MacLeod, Raza leans back and gets great power on his bottom hand to deposit his pull over deep mid-wicket all the way for a maximum. Sikandar Raza stepping up for Zimbabwe once again!

full_text: MacLeod to Ervine, 1 run, fuller and follows Ervine who shuffled away. Blocked towards cover point for a quick run

full_text: MacLeod to Raza, 1 run, flat on middle, tucked towards deep mid-wicket

full_text: MacLeod to Ervine, 1 run, short and wide, cut towards deep extra cover

full_text: MacLeod to Raza, 1 run, fuller and spinning onto off, Raza pushes it softly towards long-on

full_text: MacLeod to Ervine, 1 run, on a length and slower, turned to the right of extra cover

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Raza, 2 runs, full outside off, Raza gets a thick outside edge on his big drive that goes towards third-man, falling short of the fielder

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, 1 run, on a length tighting up Ervine. Tucked to deep square leg

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Raza, 1 run, fuller length on the pads, glanced awkwardly to deep square leg

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Raza, , classic Sikandar Raza!! Full with a bit of width and the veteran batter plays an effortless pick up shot over the cover fielder, piercing the gap between sweeper and long-off for a boundary

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, 1 run, pitched up on middle from round the wicket, driven to long-on

full_text: Leask to Raza, 3 runs, flat on leg stump, Raza scoops it behind square but the fielder diving in from deep mid-wicket does a great job to save one run for his side.

full_text: Leask to Ervine, 1 run, full and quick on off, punched to long-off

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, tossed up on off, driven hard but straight to long-off

full_text: Mark Watt to Raza, 1 run, full on off, pushed down to long-off to get off the mark

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, fired fuller on middle, driven to long-on

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 2 runs, quick and full on middle, driven over the infield but deep mid-wicket cuts it off

full_text: Leask to Williams, Caught by Wheal at deep square leg!! Gone! Leask is off on a celebratory lap. This was flat on the body, Williams tries to lap it over the infield on the leg side but picks out the fielder at deep square leg. Nice low catch taken by Wheal running in from the boundary, big wicket for Scotland.

full_text: Leask to Ervine, 1 run, fired full on off, driven down to long-off

full_text: Leask to Williams, 1 run, flat and quick on off, cut into the ground towards point for a single

full_text: Leask to Ervine, 1 run, arm ball onto the pads, glanced to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Leask to Ervine, , perfect placement! Fired quicker on off, Ervine gets into position early for a switch hit and places it accurately between third-man and backward point

full_text: Leask to Williams, leg byes, 1 run, length ball on the pads, Williams misses his clip and there's a loud appeal for LBW. Would have gone down leg

full_text: Mark Watt to Williams, 1 run, Mark Watt delivers this from 24 yards, well behind the stumps, short on the stumps, whipped to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, 1 run, good length just outside off, whipped to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, no run, another seam-up swinger outside off, Ervine drives straight to the fielder at cover

full_text: Mark Watt to Ervine, no run, the swinger at 101kph from Mark Watt, seam-up and Ervine falls over on the flick, misses but it's missing leg-stump easily

full_text: Davey to Williams, 1 run, good length outside off, Williams runs it down to third man

full_text: Davey to Williams, no run, Davey is lucky. He is angling it into the stumps from round the wicket, clipped to short fine-leg. Either side and it was four

full_text: Davey to Ervine, 1 run, good length on middle, Ervine's bat comes down at an angle and the thick leading-edge flies away through the vacant gully for a single

full_text: Davey to Ervine, no run, good length on middle-stump, glanced to short fine-leg

full_text: Davey to Williams, 1 run, good length and angling into off, Williams pushes in front of mid-on for a quick single

full_text: Wheal to Ervine, no run, sharp nipbacker from Wheal, thuds into the front pad of Ervine before he could get his bat down. A bit too high and maybe even sliding down and surprisingly no appeal for LBW from the Scots

short_text: Wheal to Ervine, , successive fours. Zimbabwe upping the rate now. Superb off-drive this as Wheal goes full and driven t
full_text: Wheal to Ervine, , successive fours. Zimbabwe upping the rate now. Superb off-drive this as Wheal goes full and driven to the left of Sharif at mid-off and he has no chance this time. Great timing and a classy blow from Ervine

short_text: Wheal to Ervine, , Sharif hesitated to dive to his right at mid-off and the ball slips away. Full outside off, Ervine dr
full_text: Wheal to Ervine, , Sharif hesitated to dive to his right at mid-off and the ball slips away. Full outside off, Ervine drives just to the right of Sharif and takes four

full_text: Wheal to Ervine, no run, fullish outside off, Ervine gets across and drives well but straight to the fielder at mid-on

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, no run, so close to the outside-edge. Full and angled across Ervine who goes for a big drive and misses

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Williams, 1 run, back of a length on the stumps, Williams plays a short-arm jab wide of deep square leg

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, 1 run, back of a length sliding down, Ervine flicks and misses, single taken

full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, no run, the free-hit ball is very full outside off, Ervine jams it out to mid-on

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, , , poor start from Safyaan Sharif. He oversteps and bowls a length ball sliding down, tucked
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Ervine, , , poor start from Safyaan Sharif. He oversteps and bowls a length ball sliding down, tucked away wide of short fine and the ball rolls away to the deep backward square leg fence

short_text: Davey to Madhevere, Bowled!! Scotland are fighting back with wickets. Full outside off, Madhevere goes for a big drive a
full_text: Davey to Madhevere, Bowled!! Scotland are fighting back with wickets. Full outside off, Madhevere goes for a big drive and drags it back on via  a thick inside-edge. Scotland are well in this game now.

short_text: Davey to Madhevere, no run, full outside off, Madhevere gets forward to drive to mid-off
full_text: Davey to Madhevere, no run, full outside off, Madhevere gets forward to drive to mid-off

short_text: Davey to Ervine, leg byes, 1 run, a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Ervine is in. This seams back in from outside off
full_text: Davey to Ervine, leg byes, 1 run, a direct-hit at the bowler's end but Ervine is in. This seams back in from outside off and raps him high on the thigh, he got outside the line of off too and takes  a quick legbye

short_text: Davey to Ervine, 2 runs, full outside off, Ervine pushes forward and the thick inside-edge goes through mid-wicket for a
full_text: Davey to Ervine, 2 runs, full outside off, Ervine pushes forward and the thick inside-edge goes through mid-wicket for a couple

full_text: Wheal to Madhevere, no run, zippy back of a length delivery seaming in, catches Madhevere high on the thigh as he is beaten for pace

full_text: Wheal to Madhevere, no run, back of a length and hitting the pitch hard just outside off, Madhevere with a neat back foot block

short_text: Wheal to Chakabva, Lbw!! Chakabva has to go as it is umpire's call on hitting. This is a skiddy length delivery hastenin
full_text: Wheal to Chakabva, Lbw!! Chakabva has to go as it is umpire's call on hitting. This is a skiddy length delivery hastening off the pitch and angling into Chakabva, who is on the shuffle, misses the nudge, rapped just above the kneeroll and the ball would've clipped the top of the stumps according to ball-tracking. Umpire Nitin Menon raises the finger and the reviews does not save Chakabva.

short_text: Wheal to Chakabva, , that's a good shot. On a back of a length outside off, Chakabva short-arm jabs the pull and gets it
full_text: Wheal to Chakabva, , that's a good shot. On a back of a length outside off, Chakabva short-arm jabs the pull and gets it wide of mid-wicket. Races away

short_text: Wheal to Chakabva, no run, hint of shape as Wheal bowls it outside off on a good length, left alone
full_text: Wheal to Chakabva, no run, hint of shape as Wheal bowls it outside off on a good length, left alone
